title: oenothera cespitosa subsp. crinita
intro: Oenothera cespitosa subsp. crinita, also known as fringed evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the fringed evening primrose are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
